doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: The EEOC Compliance Manual does not contain a "Section 8" on the ADEA, and the text employs terminology and structural formatting inconsistent with official agency publications.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EEOC Compliance Manual is organized by numbered sections that cover specific topics (e.g., Section 15 on Race and Color Discrimination), but there is no "Section 8" dedicated to the ADEA, and this text uses non-standard formatting and language not found in official EEOC publications.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EEOC Compliance Manual does not contain a "Section 8" on the ADEA, and the text employs terminology and structural formatting inconsistent with official agency publications.
